scripts.build: npm run build -w @wow/shared && npm run build -w @wow/auth-service && npm run build -w @wow/catalog-service && npm run build -w @wow/order-service && npm run build -w @wow/api-gateway
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @wow/shared" "npm run dev -w @wow/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/catalog-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/order-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/api-gateway"
